title: Dick, Deception, and Dissociation: A Comment on 'The Two Faces of Philip K. Dick'
author: Gregg Rickman
card_summary: A response article from Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 18, No. 2, July 1991) by Gregg Rickman, Dick's biographer, commenting on Robert Philmus's article 'The Two Faces of Philip K. Dick.' Rickman brings his deep biographical knowledge to bear on questions of deception and dissociation in Dick's life and work. 5 pages.
